infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs access to your location to show your position on the map during walks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs access to your location to track your position during walks for safety purposes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GoSafe to use your location for real-time tracking during walks.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow GoSafe to use your location for real-time tracking during walks.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow GoSafe to use your location to show your position on the map.
